name: Chicken with Sauce Supreme
recipeInstructions:
Chicken Soup should be a can of Condensed Cream Of Chicken Soup (10
Onions to be whole onions, drained (16 ozs)
~---------------------------------------------------------------------
~---- Cut chicken into pieces; cut each breast in half. Arrange the chicken sides up and thickest parts to outside in an oblong baking dish, 12 x 7-1/2 x 2-inches. Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Cover loosely and microwave on high (100%) until chicken is done, 20 to 25 minutes. Remove chicken from dish; reserve juices. Stir soup and parsley flakes into chicken juices. Arrange chicken in dish, coating with soup mixture. Add onions. Cover loosely and microwave until hot, 7 to 9 minutes. Serve with rice.
